upasargachandrika.example_text: 'taTA nodDftasArARi prekzate cApradAya ca' (BA॰anu॰104.90) prekzate (=prekzamARAya) =yAcakAya yAcako hi dAtfmuKaprekzI BavatIti prapUrva ikzatiryAtrAmAha

'prekzApUrvaM mayA dyUtamidamAsIdupekzitam' (BA॰saBA॰73.14) nAwyaSAlA'pi prekzAgAraM prakzAgfhaM vocyate atra prekzA dfSya Bavati
'yatra Darmo hyaDarmaRa satyaM yatrAnftena ca hanyate prekzamARAnAM hatAstatra saBAsadaH' (manu॰8.14).. prekzamARAnAM pratyakzamIkzamARAnAm
'garhaye pARqavAMstveva yuDi SrezWAn mahAbalAn ye kliSyamAnAM prekzante DarmapatnIm' (BA॰vana॰12.66).. prekzante'virunDAnA agarhayanto vA paSyantItyarTaH prasannAH santa Ikzanta iti vA'rTaH
